brief.title: Hayward/San Leandro Cold Call Outreach — SMS & Email Drafts
brief.description: Cold outreach for 22 diesel fleet leads in Hayward/San Leandro area. SMS scheduled for tomorrow (Fri 5/23) at 10:30 AM, followed by email. Track in Gumption cold calls.
brief.dedupeWarning: NOT yet deduped against Master CRM (1TdNnf7eLaPNN3anaBGpNdjo_unK04zWwZJ859ZDvIO4). Verify in Sheet before calling — some may already be customers.
brief.gumptionTracker: https://gumption.manus.space — add all leads under Cold Calls

voicemailScript: Hey [Name], Bryan with NorCal CARB Mobile. I'll be in [city] today doing Clean Truck Checks for fleets right by you. If you've got diesels over 14,000 lbs I can knock yours out same trip — mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity, 24/7, 363 days a year. Call me before the State calls you. [Your number].

smsTemplate.note: Send SMS first at 10:30 AM tomorrow, then follow up with email.
smsTemplate.defaultMessage: Hi [Name], Bryan w/ NorCal CARB Mobile. I'm in [city] this week doing Clean Truck Checks — mobile OBD & smoke opacity for diesels 14k+ lbs. If you need yours done I can swing by, 24/7 availability. Want me to stop by? norcalcarbmobile.com

emailTemplate.subjectLine: Clean Truck Check — I'll Be in [City] This Week
emailTemplate.body:
Hi [Name],

Bryan here with NorCal CARB Mobile. I'm running Clean Truck Checks in the [city] area this week and noticed your fleet might need compliance testing.

If you've got diesels over 14,000 lbs, I can come to you — mobile OBD and OVI smoke opacity testing, on-site at your yard. No downtime, no hauling trucks to a shop.

We're available 24/7, 363 days a year.

Want me to swing by? Just reply to this email or call me directly.

Bryan
NorCal CARB Mobile
norcalcarbmobile.com

hot.sms: Hi ArborTech, Bryan w/ NorCal CARB Mobile. I'm in Hayward this week doing Clean Truck Checks — mobile OBD & smoke opacity for diesels 14k+ lbs. If your fleet needs compliance testing I can swing by your yard on Ruus Ln. Want me to stop by? norcalcarbmobile.com
